description:
You are an Administrative Services Manager coordinating a headquarters renovation project using Redmine. Your task is to set up discussion forums for the project team and create initial discussion topics within the current project.

Create two new discussion forum boards:
1. Name: "Renovation Planning" with the description "Discussion forum for renovation design and planning decisions"
2. Name: "Logistics & Scheduling" with the description "Coordination of timelines, moves, and resource scheduling"

In the "Renovation Planning" forum, create a discussion topic with the subject "Floor Plan Review - 3rd Floor" and the message: "Please review the proposed floor plan changes for the 3rd floor. Key changes include open office layout and two new meeting rooms." Post a reply to this topic with the message: "I suggest we add a quiet workspace area near the east windows."

In the "Logistics & Scheduling" forum, create a discussion topic with the subject "IT Equipment Moving Schedule" and the message: "We need to finalize the schedule for relocating all IT equipment. Proposed dates are March 15-17."
